name: nezuko-companion-app
description: Nezuko desktop companion for VS Code

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron "npm run dev:web" "npm run electron:launch"
scripts.electron:launch: wait-on --verbose --timeout 30000 --interval 250 http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && cross-env ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=1 VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist-electron/companion/electron/main.js
